data.title: Asia And Europe Markets Gain On Partial US Reciprocal Tariff Exemptions; Dollar Hits Multi-Month Low - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: addition, the U.S. exempted certain electronics from reciprocal tariffs, easing fears of a deepening trade war.US markets closed higher fueled by upbeat bank earnings and comments from Fed officials. All 11 S&P 500 sectors gained, with materials and tech leading. Asia markets rose, and European markets up as US exempts some goods from tariffs.

data.title: Tesla's Spring OTA Update Brings New Features To Model 3, S, X, Y And Cybertruck: Here's What To Expect
data.description: Tesla unveiled Spring software updates for Model 3, S, X, Y, and Cybertruck, including adaptive headlights and other features.

data.title: EU Threatens Additional Taxes On US Tech Giants Amid Ongoing Tariff War: 'We Are Developing Retaliatory Measures', Says Von der Leyen
data.description: The European Union (EU) is contemplating imposing levies on U.S. tech giants like Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) and Google (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) if the ongoing tariff negotiations with the Trump administration fail to be resolved.

data.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Offers Researchers Up To $100,000 To Hack Into Starlink
data.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX offers up to $100,000 to security researchers for testing and fixing vulnerabilities in Starlink.

data.title: SpaceX Launches 9th Batch Of NRO Spy Satellites For US Government
data.description: SpaceX launched 9th batch of satellites for US Govt on April 12, 2025. This comes as Space X prepares to expand its global presence.
